name: TestCommonSubplanExtract
cases: select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10
select a+1 as x from t1 where b > 5 union all select a+1 as x from t1 where b > 5
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10
select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10 union all select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10
select a, count(*) from t1 where b > 0 group by a union all select a, count(*) from t1 where b > 0 group by a
select a from t1 where b > 10
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 20
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t2 where b > 10
select a+1 from t1 where b > 5 union all select a+2 from t1 where b > 5
set @@tidb_opt_enable_common_subplan_extract = 0
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10
set @@tidb_opt_enable_common_subplan_extract = 1
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t2 where b > 10
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t2 where c > 5 union all select a from t2 where c > 5
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10
(select a from t1 where b > 0 order by c limit 10) union all (select a from t1 where b > 0 order by c limit 10)
select a, count(*) from t1 group by a having count(*) > 1 union all select a, count(*) from t1 group by a having count(*) > 1
select t1.a from t1, t2, t3 where t1.a = t2.a and t2.b = t3.b union all select t1.a from t1, t2, t3 where t1.a = t2.a and t2.b = t3.b
select t1.a, t1.b from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b = t2.b and t1.c > 0 union all select t1.a, t1.b from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b = t2.b and t1.c > 0
select * from (select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 10) t
(select a from t1 order by b limit 5) union all (select a from t1 order by b limit 10)
(select a from t1 order by b asc limit 5) union all (select a from t1 order by b desc limit 5)
select a, count(*) from t1 group by a union all select b, count(*) from t1 group by b
select a, sum(b) from t1 group by a union all select a, sum(c) from t1 group by a
select a, count(*) from t1 group by a having count(*) > 1 union all select a, count(*) from t1 group by a having count(*) > 2
select a from t1 where b > 10 union all select a from t1 where b > 20 union all select a from t1 where b > 30
select t1.a from t1 inner join t2 on t1.a = t2.a union all select t1.a from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a
